title: chore(deps): update dependency @hono/node-server to ^1.19.11
summary: Renovate Bot patch bump of @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.11. Includes a security fix (GHSA-wc8c-qw6v-h7f6: authorization bypass in Serve Static Middleware via inconsistent %2F URL decoding) in v1.19.10 and a Content-Length bug fix in v1.19.11. Changes are limited to 2 package.json files (server-adapters/hono, workflows/inngest) and the pnpm lockfile (which also picked up @ast-grep/napi 0.41.0 -> 0.41.1).
maintainerNotes: Security-relevant patch update — v1.19.10 fixes an authorization bypass in Serve Static Middleware. Already approved and mergeable with no conflicts. CI shows 2 failures (Full Test Suite, Observability Package Tests) but E2E and Memory tests are still pending; the failures are likely unrelated to this lockfile-only change. Build, lint, and validation checks all pass. Recommend merging once pending checks complete or confirming the failures are pre-existing/flaky.
